mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO AI_ANALYSIS_STATE (trip_id, analysis_status) VALUES (#{tripId}, 'IDLE')
mapper.update: UPDATE AI_ANALYSIS_STATE SET analysis_status = 'RUNNING' WHERE trip_id = #{tripId} AND analysis_status != 'RUNNING' AND (next_retry_at IS NULL OR next_retry_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CHAT_MESSAGE m LEFT JOIN AI_ANALYSIS_STATE s ON s.trip_id = m.trip_id WHERE m.trip_id = #{tripId} AND m.message_type = 'TEXT' AND m.message_id > COALESCE(s.last_analyzed_message_id, 0)

SELECT m.message_id AS messageId, m.trip_id AS tripId, m.sender_user_id AS senderUserId, u.nickname AS senderNickname, m.message_type AS messageType, m.content, m.created_at AS createdAt FROM CHAT_MESSAGE m JOIN APP_USER u ON u.user_id = m.sender_user_id LEFT JOIN AI_ANALYSIS_STATE s ON s.trip_id = m.trip_id WHERE m.trip_id = #{tripId} AND m.message_type = 'TEXT' AND m.message_id > COALESCE(s.last_analyzed_message_id, 0) ORDER BY m.message_id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AI_ANALYSIS_RUN ( trip_id, requested_by_user_id, trigger_type, first_message_id, last_message_id, message_count, status ) VALUES ( #{run.tripId}, #{run.requestedByUserId}, #{run.triggerType}, #{run.firstMessageId}, #{run.lastMessageId}, #{run.messageCount}, 'RUNNING' )

INSERT INTO AI_SUGGESTION ( analysis_run_id, suggested_place_id, suggested_place_name, suggested_region_hint, suggestion_type, suggested_title, summary, reason, schedule_date, start_time, end_time, day_no, sort_order, status ) VALUES ( #{suggestion.analysisRunId}, #{suggestion.suggestedPlaceId}, #{suggestion.suggestedPlaceName}, #{suggestion.suggestedRegionHint}, 'SCHEDULE', #{suggestion.suggestedTitle}, #{suggestion.summary}, #{suggestion.reason}, #{suggestion.scheduleDate}, #{suggestion.startTime}, #{suggestion.endTime}, #{suggestion.dayNo}, #{suggestion.sortOrder}, 'PENDING' )
mapper.update: UPDATE AI_ANALYSIS_RUN SET status = 'SUCCEEDED', completed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE analysis_run_id = #{runId}
UPDATE AI_ANALYSIS_STATE SET last_analyzed_message_id = #{lastMessageId}, analysis_status = 'IDLE', retry_count = 0, next_retry_at = NULL WHERE trip_id = #{tripId}
UPDATE AI_ANALYSIS_STATE SET analysis_status = 'FAILED', retry_count = retry_count + 1, next_retry_at = DATE_ADD(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) WHERE trip_id = #{tripId}
UPDATE AI_ANALYSIS_STATE SET analysis_status = 'IDLE' WHERE trip_id = #{tripId}
